bullets.text: Built and maintained automation services to provision and manage lab environments at scale, reducing manual setup time by 40% across 12 labs.
Designed internal tooling and workflows integrating identity, authentication, and system configuration services, improving reliability and reducing identity-related incidents by 50%.
Implemented monitoring and service-health checks for recurring failures, lowering incident volume by 25%.
Optimized system configuration and network segmentation, improving performance and stability by 30%.
Partnered with the SRE team on failover strategies that improved service availability from 97.5% to 99.9%.
Built a distributed observability platform using Python, Flask, Prometheus, Grafana, Elasticsearch, Kibana, and PostgreSQL to process 15,000+ metrics per minute across multiple microservices.
Implemented real-time alerting and centralized log aggregation, reducing incident detection time by 85% and improving production visibility.
Designed SLO and error-budget tracking workflows with rate-limited alerting and backoff strategies to improve reliability engineering coverage.
Built an AI-powered browser extension using React, TypeScript, Tailwind, AWS Lambda, PDF.js, and Mammoth to compare resumes against job descriptions and identify missing skills.
Integrated a fine-tuned model pipeline for resume and job-description comparison, improving match precision by over 85% while maintaining sub-second UI load times.
Developed a serverless email triage platform with Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma, AWS SES, and Python to classify and prioritize messages with 92% accuracy.
Reduced operational overhead by 30% through automated email categorization and workflow optimization.
Built a multi-agent procurement platform using Python, Flask, Google Cloud, Supabase, Twilio, and ElevenLabs that reduced sourcing cycles by 90% and accelerated quote turnaround by 10x.

rules: Only use approved bullets from this experience bank.
Do not invent projects, metrics, or responsibilities.
Prefer bullets with strongest tag overlap with the target job.
